## Change Type

- [ ] `feat`: new capability
- [ ] `fix`: bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: documentation only
- [ ] `chore`: maintenance/tooling
- [ ] `refactor`: behavior-preserving restructure
- [ ] `test`: test-only change
- [ ] `build`: build/dependency change
- [ ] `ci`: CI/CD change
- [ ] `style`: formatting/style-only change
